candidates.why: Candidate is a top-line income/revenue row and equals Net sales in the preview for all shown years.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used a row outside the candidate list because 'Net sales' is the most semantically correct revenue label in column A, while candidate 'Total income' is less precise and could be broader in other filings. Candidate list appears to miss the better label. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net sales

Recurring borrowing interest expense component.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest-cost components and excluded 'Financial expenses' because it likely includes FX/non-interest items. Excluded 'Interest on lease liabilities' to avoid double counting with 'Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities'.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent equity is available.
Income allocation row, not balance sheet equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-only equity to keep BE exclusive of non-controlling interests.
